title: Minister Withdraws AI Policy Due to Fabricated Sources
summary: Minister Solly Malatsi withdrew the Draft South Africa AI Policy due to fabricated sources, causing embarrassment.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of verifying sources in AI policy development to maintain credibility.

title: Commercial Real Estate Outlook in 2026

title: Data Foundation: Key to Agentic Enterprise

title: OpenAI Shifts Focus Away From AGI
